summary.shape_sentence: Opened near the upper session band, failed quickly, printed a hard opening flush, then spent the rest of RTH in a weak rebound/base that never repaired the morning damage.

goat.note: Best standout move was the opening downside flush from the 25,580-25,600 area into the session low near 25,070.

red_circles.behavior: Clustered near upper pivots before the break and again on rebound failures, marking repeated sell-the-pop behavior.

green_circles.behavior: Expanded after the flush low, showing stair-step support during the recovery, but buyers stayed reactive rather than dominant.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 25,560-25,620 capped the opening area and later 25,300-25,360 capped rebound attempts; both zones were respected.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Initial support around 25,500 failed on the opening flush, while deeper demand around 25,080-25,150 helped stabilize the low and form a base.

time_markers.10am_blue: Active opening breakdown; the market was accelerating lower through broken support.
time_markers.12pm_red: Midday rotation off the lows, but structure remained weak and corrective.
time_markers.2pm_green: Afternoon rebound was pushing into lower supply near 25,300+, without full structural repair.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed red, off the low but still in the lower half of the session range.

takeaway: Bearish opening-flush day with early upper-band failure, fast downside expansion, and only a corrective rebound/base into the close.
